proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with feature_009 == 0 have less negative dependency_BRAF scores than cell lines without that predicate.
Cell lines with feature_022 == 1 have more negative dependency_EGFR scores than cell lines without that predicate.
Cell lines with feature_024 == 0 have less negative dependency_ERBB2 scores than cell lines without that predicate.
Cell lines with feature_014 == 0 have less negative dependency_KRAS scores than cell lines without that predicate.
Cell lines with feature_027 == 0 have less negative dependency_RIT1 scores than cell lines without that predicate.

analyses.code: Welch-style comparison of mean dependency_BRAF for feature_009 == 0 versus all other cell lines.
analyses.result_summary: Mean dependency_BRAF was -0.2495 in-predicate versus -0.8047 outside (n=44426 vs 5574). Effect estimate 0.5552; p=<1e-300; significant=true.

analyses.code: Welch-style comparison of mean dependency_EGFR for feature_022 == 1 versus all other cell lines.
analyses.result_summary: Mean dependency_EGFR was -0.601 in-predicate versus -0.2524 outside (n=3880 vs 46120). Effect estimate -0.3486; p=<1e-300; significant=true.

analyses.code: Welch-style comparison of mean dependency_ERBB2 for feature_024 == 0 versus all other cell lines.
analyses.result_summary: Mean dependency_ERBB2 was -0.2535 in-predicate versus -0.6856 outside (n=45110 vs 4890). Effect estimate 0.4321; p=<1e-300; significant=true.

analyses.code: Welch-style comparison of mean dependency_KRAS for feature_014 == 0 versus all other cell lines.
analyses.result_summary: Mean dependency_KRAS was -0.252 in-predicate versus -0.5594 outside (n=38158 vs 11842). Effect estimate 0.3075; p=<1e-300; significant=true.

analyses.code: Welch-style comparison of mean dependency_RIT1 for feature_027 == 0 versus all other cell lines.
analyses.result_summary: Mean dependency_RIT1 was -0.2572 in-predicate versus -0.3527 outside (n=45440 vs 4560). Effect estimate 0.0955; p=<1e-300; significant=true.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with feature_011 == "colorectal" have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than cell lines without that predicate.
A one-standard-deviation increase in feature_028 is associated with more negative dependency_KIF18A scores.
Cell lines with feature_016 >= 0.964 (top quartile) have more negative dependency_TMED10 scores than cell lines without that predicate.
A one-standard-deviation increase in feature_016 is associated with more negative dependency_TMED10 scores.
Cell lines with feature_016 <= 0.694 (bottom quartile) have less negative dependency_DHX9 scores than cell lines without that predicate.
A one-standard-deviation increase in feature_016 is associated with more negative dependency_DHX9 scores.
Cell lines with feature_016 >= 0.964 (top quartile) have more negative dependency_POLR2A scores than cell lines without that predicate.
A one-standard-deviation increase in feature_016 is associated with more negative dependency_POLR2A scores.
Cell lines with feature_018 == 0 have less negative dependency_RPL11 scores than cell lines without that predicate.
A one-standard-deviation increase in feature_003 is associated with more negative dependency_RPL11 scores.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint pattern feature_014 == 0 and feature_010 == "her2_enriched" makes dependency_BRAF less negative than expected from the two main effects alone.
The joint pattern feature_022 == 1 and feature_010 == "her2_enriched" makes dependency_EGFR less negative than expected from the two main effects alone.
The joint pattern feature_010 == "basal" and feature_022 == 1 makes dependency_ERBB2 more negative than expected from the two main effects alone.
The joint pattern feature_020 == 0 and feature_010 == "her2_enriched" makes dependency_KRAS more negative than expected from the two main effects alone.
The joint pattern feature_021 == 0 and feature_018 == 0 makes dependency_RIT1 less negative than expected from the two main effects alone.

analyses.code: Two-predicate interaction contrast for dependency_BRAF: (feature_014 == 0 x feature_010 == "her2_enriched").
analyses.result_summary: Four-cell interaction means for dependency_BRAF: neither=-0.2946, feature_010 == "her2_enriched" only=-0.3632, feature_014 == 0 only=-0.3172, both=-0.2811. Effect estimate 0.1047; p=0.001; significant=true.

analyses.code: Two-predicate interaction contrast for dependency_EGFR: (feature_022 == 1 x feature_010 == "her2_enriched").
analyses.result_summary: Four-cell interaction means for dependency_EGFR: neither=-0.2525, feature_010 == "her2_enriched" only=-0.246, feature_022 == 1 only=-0.6021, both=-0.5291. Effect estimate 0.0665; p=0.1656; significant=false.

analyses.code: Two-predicate interaction contrast for dependency_ERBB2: (feature_010 == "basal" x feature_022 == 1).
analyses.result_summary: Four-cell interaction means for dependency_ERBB2: neither=-0.2959, feature_022 == 1 only=-0.2837, feature_010 == "basal" only=-0.3108, both=-0.3716. Effect estimate -0.073; p=0.0498; significant=true.

analyses.code: Two-predicate interaction contrast for dependency_KRAS: (feature_020 == 0 x feature_010 == "her2_enriched").
analyses.result_summary: Four-cell interaction means for dependency_KRAS: neither=-0.3482, feature_010 == "her2_enriched" only=-0.2511, feature_020 == 0 only=-0.3215, both=-0.3136. Effect estimate -0.0892; p=0.0174; significant=true.

analyses.code: Two-predicate interaction contrast for dependency_RIT1: (feature_021 == 0 x feature_018 == 0).
analyses.result_summary: Four-cell interaction means for dependency_RIT1: neither=-0.217, feature_018 == 0 only=-0.255, feature_021 == 0 only=-0.2745, both=-0.2653. Effect estimate 0.0471; p=0.0168; significant=true.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic feature-by-feature interaction screen identifies feature_014 == 0 and feature_010 == "her2_enriched" as the strongest heterogeneity pair for dependency_BRAF, making dependency_BRAF less negative than expected under additivity.

A systematic feature-by-feature interaction screen identifies feature_022 == 1 and feature_010 == "her2_enriched" as the strongest heterogeneity pair for dependency_EGFR, making dependency_EGFR less negative than expected under additivity.

A systematic feature-by-feature interaction screen identifies feature_010 == "basal" and feature_022 == 1 as the strongest heterogeneity pair for dependency_ERBB2, making dependency_ERBB2 more negative than expected under additivity.

A systematic feature-by-feature interaction screen identifies feature_020 == 0 and feature_010 == "her2_enriched" as the strongest heterogeneity pair for dependency_KRAS, making dependency_KRAS more negative than expected under additivity.

A systematic feature-by-feature interaction screen identifies feature_021 == 0 and feature_018 == 0 as the strongest heterogeneity pair for dependency_RIT1, making dependency_RIT1 less negative than expected under additivity.

A systematic feature-by-feature interaction screen identifies feature_011 == "colorectal" and feature_035 == 0 as the strongest heterogeneity pair for dependency_KIF18A, making dependency_KIF18A less negative than expected under additivity.

A systematic feature-by-feature interaction screen identifies feature_010 == "luminal" and feature_032 == 0 as the strongest heterogeneity pair for dependency_TMED10, making dependency_TMED10 less negative than expected under additivity.

A systematic feature-by-feature interaction screen identifies feature_010 == "her2_enriched" and feature_012 == 0 as the strongest heterogeneity pair for dependency_DHX9, making dependency_DHX9 less negative than expected under additivity.

A systematic feature-by-feature interaction screen identifies feature_010 == "basal" and feature_027 == 0 as the strongest heterogeneity pair for dependency_POLR2A, making dependency_POLR2A less negative than expected under additivity.

A systematic feature-by-feature interaction screen identifies feature_032 == 0 and feature_011 == "skin" as the strongest heterogeneity pair for dependency_RPL11, making dependency_RPL11 more negative than expected under additivity.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise interaction screen over top single-feature predicates for dependency_BRAF.
analyses.result_summary: Strongest interaction was feature_014 == 0 by feature_010 == "her2_enriched". Effect estimate 0.1047; p=0.001; significant=true.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise interaction screen over top single-feature predicates for dependency_EGFR.
analyses.result_summary: Strongest interaction was feature_022 == 1 by feature_010 == "her2_enriched". Effect estimate 0.0665; p=0.1656; significant=false.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise interaction screen over top single-feature predicates for dependency_ERBB2.
analyses.result_summary: Strongest interaction was feature_010 == "basal" by feature_022 == 1. Effect estimate -0.073; p=0.0498; significant=true.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise interaction screen over top single-feature predicates for dependency_KRAS.
analyses.result_summary: Strongest interaction was feature_020 == 0 by feature_010 == "her2_enriched". Effect estimate -0.0892; p=0.0174; significant=true.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise interaction screen over top single-feature predicates for dependency_RIT1.
analyses.result_summary: Strongest interaction was feature_021 == 0 by feature_018 == 0. Effect estimate 0.0471; p=0.0168; significant=true.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise interaction screen over top single-feature predicates for dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: Strongest interaction was feature_011 == "colorectal" by feature_035 == 0. Effect estimate 0.6822; p=<1e-300; significant=true.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise interaction screen over top single-feature predicates for dependency_TMED10.
analyses.result_summary: Strongest interaction was feature_010 == "luminal" by feature_032 == 0. Effect estimate 0.0574; p=0.0167; significant=true.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise interaction screen over top single-feature predicates for dependency_DHX9.
analyses.result_summary: Strongest interaction was feature_010 == "her2_enriched" by feature_012 == 0. Effect estimate 0.0583; p=0.0984; significant=false.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise interaction screen over top single-feature predicates for dependency_POLR2A.
analyses.result_summary: Strongest interaction was feature_010 == "basal" by feature_027 == 0. Effect estimate 0.054; p=0.0461; significant=true.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise interaction screen over top single-feature predicates for dependency_RPL11.
analyses.result_summary: Strongest interaction was feature_032 == 0 by feature_011 == "skin". Effect estimate -0.0677; p=0.0021; significant=true.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final best-supported subgroup for dependency_BRAF: cell lines satisfying feature_009 == 1 and feature_016 >= 0.964 (top quartile) and feature_011 == "lung" have more negative dependency_BRAF scores than all other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for dependency_EGFR: cell lines satisfying feature_022 == 1 and feature_011 == "brain" and feature_016 >= 0.964 (top quartile) have more negative dependency_EGFR scores than all other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for dependency_ERBB2: cell lines satisfying feature_024 == 1 and feature_011 == "breast" and feature_010 == "her2_enriched" have more negative dependency_ERBB2 scores than all other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for dependency_KRAS: cell lines satisfying feature_014 == 1 and feature_016 >= 0.964 (top quartile) and feature_011 == "hematopoietic" have more negative dependency_KRAS scores than all other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for dependency_RIT1: cell lines satisfying feature_027 == 1 and feature_016 <= 0.694 (bottom quartile) and feature_009 == 1 have more negative dependency_RIT1 scores than all other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for dependency_KIF18A: cell lines satisfying feature_011 == "colorectal" and feature_035 == 1 and feature_028 >= 0.819 (top quartile) have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than all other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for dependency_TMED10: cell lines satisfying feature_016 >= 0.964 (top quartile) and feature_026 >= 1.08 (top quartile) and feature_010 == "luminal" have more negative dependency_TMED10 scores than all other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for dependency_DHX9: cell lines satisfying feature_016 >= 0.964 (top quartile) and feature_023 >= 5.669 (top quartile) and feature_011 == "prostate" have more negative dependency_DHX9 scores than all other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for dependency_POLR2A: cell lines satisfying feature_016 >= 0.964 (top quartile) and feature_010 == "adenocarcinoma" and feature_003 >= 0.428 (top quartile) have more negative dependency_POLR2A scores than all other cell lines.

Final best-supported subgroup for dependency_RPL11: cell lines satisfying feature_018 == 1 and feature_016 >= 0.964 (top quartile) and feature_011 == "ovarian" have more negative dependency_RPL11 scores than all other cell lines.
